snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge - AARI AARI | Ranveer Singh | Shashwat Sachdev, Bombay Rockers | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Get ready to witness the sound of revenge. ❤️‍🔥

Presenting #AariAari, the powerful new track from #DhurandharTheRevenge.

With electrifying music, intense energy, and commanding vocals, this track brings the spirit of revenge alive like never before.
Listen now and feel the unstoppable energy of #AariAari. 🔥

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Teaser | Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 10 Apr
snippet.description:
Laughter, screams, and surprises are waiting inside the Bangla. Dare to enter? 🤣🧟‍♀️
#BhoothBanglaTeaser out now!

#BhoothBangla in cinemas on 10th April 2026 👻

Bhooth Bangla reunites #AkshayKumar with acclaimed director #Priyadarshan after 14 years, promising a delightful blend of comedy, horror, and thrill.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Farahjaan Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani

Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SEMI FINALS | Day 1 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SEMI FINALS of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens. The stakes rise. There is no margin for error now.

After battling through The Grind, Round stages, Quarter Finals and Wildcard, only the strongest remain. Every match carries weight. Every fight moves teams one step closer to the Grand Finals.

This is where contenders turn into finalists.

Watch the SEMI FINALS live and witness who takes the next step toward the championship stage.

snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: Léa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

localized.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
localized.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: Léa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra
2D Effects Artist: Ina Choi

'Arirang' Composer & Piano: Goldbranch
Sound Designer: Jang Mi Ra

snippet.title: Majhi Baay | Majhi Baay Go 2.0 | Nick Shinde | Shraddha Pawar | Ayush S | Keval | Sonali | Prashant

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D’Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director’s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Day-04 | श्री शिव महापुराण कथा | पूज्य पंडित प्रदीप जी मिश्रा | भुसावल,महाराष्ट्र #shivmahapuran #om
snippet.description:
Day - 04 | श्री शिव महापुराण कथा | पूज्य पंडित प्रदीप जी मिश्रा | भुसावल, महाराष्ट्र #shiva #pradeepmishra #katha #live #shivmahapuran #om

श्री विट्ठलेश सेवा समिति, सीहोर के तत्वावधान में अंतर्राष्ट्रीय कथा प्रवक्ता भागवत भूषण परम पूज्य पण्डित प्रदीप जी मिश्रा (सीहोर वाले) के मुखारविंद से देवों के देव महादेव की महिमालीलाओं का स्तुतिगान "श्री शिव महापुराण कथा" का  ग्राम-पाडळसे, तालुका-यावल, सावदा रोड, तापी नदी के किनारे, भुसावल, महाराष्ट्र से सीधा प्रसारण देखिए

Akshay Kumar with Director Priyadarshan is set for Bhooth Bangla Franchise with Tabu & Wamiqa Gabbi in Mysterious Roles of Horror Comedy & Suspense- Bhooth Bangla Teaser is pure Nostalgia of Bhool Bhulaiyaa but falls short in editing & establishing connection of Old Characters in new story. Bhooth Bangla Teaser Trailer Reaction & Full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. Can Akshay Kumar challenge Kartik Aaryan for OG Horror Comedy Franchise? Do leave Comments below now!

#BhoothBangla #BhoothBanglaTeaser #BhoothBanglaTeaserReview

#aksharasingh #pakhihedge #rakeshbabu #devsingh #premdubey #vidyasingh #ambehaimerimaa #aksharasinghfanpage #bhojpuri #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuritrailer #trending 

IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH YASHI FILMS  Pvt Ltd. 
स्टारकास्ट - अक्षरा  सिंह  , पाखी  हेड़गे , राकेश  बाबू  , देव  सिंह  , प्रेम  दुबे  ,विद्या  सिंह  ,रामसुजान  सिंह  , निशा  सिंह  , निशा  तिवारी  , इन्द्रसेन  सिंह , सुवेश , प्रीति  राज , मंटू , राहुल  शर्मा  ,प्रिया  पारुल , शीतल  यादव , प्रिया  चौधरी  
बाल कलाकार - स्वस्तिका  राय ,गुनगुन  
फ़िल्म -  अम्बे है मेरी माँ
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
निर्देशक – प्रवीण कुमार गुडूरी
लेखक – अरबिंद तिवारी
 संगीतकार-  ओम झा
गीतकार – प्यारे लाल यादव , अरबिंद तिवारी , नृपजीत सिंह
एसोसिएट  डायरेक्टर  – रवि  तिवारी  , सुवेश  , मज़ेर  खान  मनीष
 संकलन -  प्रीतम नाईक
 छायांकन- माही शेरला
कोरियोग्राफर -  पप्पू खन्ना
मारधाड़ - दिनेश यादव
पार्शव संगीत - राजेश कुमार कुर्मी
 पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन -   3 स्टूडियो
आर्ट डायरेक्टर -  राजीव शर्मा राजू
वी एफ एक्स  - चन्दन कुमार भारती
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, पंकज तिवारी व अशवनी शर्मा
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी 
म्यूजिक – IVY म्यूजिक
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय , विशाल यादव
 B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
 ऑफिस बॉय - कन्हैया झा
 IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट – फाइनेंस -  प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे, हिमांशु चौधरी , 
B4U – फाइनेंस  -  संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार 

Film – AMBE HAI MERI MAA 
Cast:  Akshara singh , Pakhi Hedge , Rakesh babu , Dev singh , Prem dubey ,Vidhya singh ,ramsujan singh , Nisha singh , Nisha tiwari , Indrasen Singh, Suvesh Priti raaj, Mantu, Rahul Sharma ,Priya parul, Shital Yadav, Priya chaudhari 
Child artist – Swastika rai  ,Gungun
Concept: Sandeep Singh
 Director: Praveen Kumar Guduri
 Writer : Arbind tiwari 
 Music Director: Om jha 
Lyrics: Pyare Lal Yadav , Arbind tiwari , Nripjeet singh 
Associate director – Ravi tiwari , Suvesh , Mazer khan ,Manish
 Editor: Preetam Nayak 
Cinematographer: Mahi Sherla 
Choreographer: Pappu Khanna 
Action director – Dinesh Yadav
BGM- Rajesh Kumar kurmi
VFX – Chandan kumar Bharti 
Postproduction: 3 studio
Art Director: Rajeev Sharma , Raju
Producers: Sandeep Singh, Pankaj Tiwari Ashwani sharma
Satellite, and Digital Partner: B4U Bhojpuri
Music- IVY Music 
 B4U Creative Team: Marud Sharma, Neha Upadhyay, Vishal Yadav
 B4U Legal Team: Sandeep Rana, Trishna Patel, Poonam Shinde, Akanksha Wakode-More 
Office Boy: Kanhaiya Jha
 Ivy Entertainment - Finance Pradeep K. Daga, Jinelle Mascarenhas, Vipul Jain, Nivrutti Patil, Ganesh Tapare, Himanshu Chaudhary
 B4U – Finance Team Santosh Garg, Ravinder Salvi, Sakshi Shelar

snippet.title: #4k Video Chhaudi Bhatar Khojo Hain | #Ashish Yadav & #Anjali Bharti | New Magahi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Presenting 2026 ka sabse bada Magahi Dhamaka! 💥
New Magahi hit “Chhaudi Bhatar Khojo Hain”, sung by Ashish Yadav & Anjali Bharti. Written by Aman Albela and powered by energetic music from Pappu Bhai, the song features Ashish Yadav & Anchal Singh Rajpoot bringing full desi entertainment on screen.

नया मगही हिट गाना “छौड़ी भतार खोजो है” अब @IVYMagahiGaana YouTube Channel पर रिलीज़ हो चुका है।

Credits:
Singer – Ashish Yadav & Anjali Bharti
Lyricist – Aman Albela
Music – Pappu Bhai
Featuring – Ashish Yadav & Anchal Singh Rajpoot
Video Dr :- Banti Patel 
Choreographer :- Raunak Shah 
Dop :- Rajesh Rathore & Rahul Roy
Editor :- Shubham Thakur 
DI :- Rohit Singh 
Production :- Sp Production

╭══════•♪♫••¨••♫♪♪♫•══════╮

नया मगही हिट गाना “छौड़ी भतार खोजो है” अब @IVYMagahiGaana YouTube Channel पर रिलीज़ हो चुका है।

Credits:
Singer – Ashish Yadav & Anjali Bharti
Lyricist – Aman Albela
Music – Pappu Bhai
Featuring – Ashish Yadav & Anchal Singh Rajpoot
Video Dr :- Banti Patel 
Choreographer :- Raunak Shah 
Dop :- Rajesh Rathore & Rahul Roy
Editor :- Shubham Thakur 
DI :- Rohit Singh 
Production :- Sp Production

snippet.title: Disclosure Day | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This summer everything will become clear. Disclosure Day in theaters 06.12.26.

If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to seven billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those films earned more than $3 billion worldwide. Koepp also wrote the script for this 2025’s Jurassic World Rebirth. 

Disclosure Day is produced by five-time Academy Award® nominee Kristie Macosko Krieger (The Fabelmans, West Side Story) and by Spielberg for Amblin Entertainment. The executive producers are Adam Somner and Chris Brigham. 

Steven Spielberg is one of the industry’s most successful and influential filmmakers. The top-grossing director of all time, Spielberg has helmed such blockbusters as Jaws, E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial, the Indiana Jones franchise and Jurassic Park. 
 
Among his myriad honors, he is a three-time Academy Award® winner, including Oscars® for Best Director and Best Picture for Schindler’s List, which received a total of seven Oscars®, and for Best Director for Saving Private Ryan. His most recent film, The Fabelmans, was released by Universal in 2022 and received seven Academy Award® nominations, including for Directing, Best Original Screenplay, Best Actress and Best Picture. 

Website: https://www.disclosuredaymovie.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/disclosuredayfilm/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/disclosureday/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@universalpics
X: https://x.com/disclosureday
Hashtag: #DisclosureDay

snippet.title: The Hype Is REAL! Dhurandhar 2 Trailer Reaction
snippet.description:
The Dhurandhar 2 trailer is finally here and we couldn’t wait to watch it! This sequel already looks massive, with bigger action, intense moments, and that larger-than-life style that makes Indian cinema so exciting.

In this video we react to the official Dhurandhar 2 trailer for the first time and share our honest thoughts about the action, the visuals, and what this movie might bring to the story.

Is Dhurandhar 2 about to deliver one of the most epic action experiences yet? This trailer definitely raises the stakes and we break down everything that caught our attention.

If you enjoy authentic movie reactions, trailer reactions, and discovering epic films from around the world, make sure to subscribe and join us for more reactions!

🎬 Watch the FULL reaction to all Indian movies and many others, plus get early access to all videos on Patreon:
https://patreon.com/reatores

You can also support the channel and get early access to all content by becoming a YouTube Channel Member!
What did YOU think about the Dhurandhar 2 trailer? Let us know in the comments!

#Dhurandhar2 #TrailerReaction #IndianMovies #IndianCinema #Bollywood #MovieReaction #ActionMovie #FilmReaction #MovieTrailer #EpicAction

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,

US Air Date: April 19, 2026
Starring: Harold Perrineau, Catalina Sandino Moreno, Hannah Cheramy
Network: MGM+
Synopsis: In Season Four, the closer the residents of town get to the answers they seek, the more terrifying their search becomes. Who is the Man in Yellow, and what does he want? Will Jade and Tabitha’s revelation be the key to finally going home? How much longer can Boyd hold the town together, even as his body and mind are falling apart? And what role will the town’s most recent arrival play in the events to come? Season Four will open doors that some in town will end up wishing had remained closed.

snippet.description:
TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | Gurpeet Kaur | Badshah | New Haryanvi Song 2026
TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | Gurpeet Kaur | Badshah | New Haryanvi Song 2026

A fresh and energetic New Haryanvi Song 2026 – “TATEEREE (Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri)”, presented by Haryanvi Star Records, bringing the vibrant flavor of Haryana’s folk rhythm and modern music together.

HARYANVI STAR RECORDS PRESENTS LATEST NEW HARYANVI NEW SONG 2026 🌍 🎵 “ TATEEREE” BRAND LATEST HARYANVI SONG 🎶 🗣️ IN THE VOICE OF “ MOHINI PATEL ” AND STARING BY “ GURPREET KAUR | DEEPAK REDHU ” THE NEW HR SONG IS MUSIC DIRECTED BY “ ABHI SAINI ”🎵 🎼 LATEST NEW HARYANVI  DJ SONGS ARE LYRICS PENNED BY “ ANIL DUBETA ” 🖊️ 🔖 THE VIDEO OF THE NEW HARYANVI SONGS HARYANAVI 2026 IS VIDEO BY “ JEET MOR  ” 🎬🎥

TATEEREE | Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Latest Haryanvi Song

This song captures the playful romance and desi swag of Haryanvi culture. The catchy line “Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri” adds a fun and addictive vibe that makes everyone want to dance and enjoy the rhythm.

snippet.title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge Trailer reaction | Ranveer Singh | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Finally the wait is over! After two teasers building up the hype, we’re finally watching the official trailer of Dhurandhar: The Revenge and sharing our reaction with you all. 

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/ChaatNChat
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/chaatnchats/
Miguel Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/miguelchachu/

This trailer has been highly awaited, and we were really curious to see what the makers reveal this time after keeping things mysterious in the earlier teasers.

The film is directed by Aditya Dhar and stars Ranveer Singh, along with a powerful cast including Sanjay Dutt, R. Madhavan, Arjun Rampal, and Sara Arjun. The story continues the intense spy-action saga, with Ranveer Singh appearing in dual avatars and the revenge storyline taking things to a much bigger level.

Join us as we break down the trailer, talk about the action, the vibe, and everything that stood out. Let us know in the comments what you thought about this trailer and if it lived up to the hype!

#reaction #dhurandhar #trailer #bollywood #ranveersingh #india

snippet.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailer Reaction! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Jaby and Achara react to the explosive trailer of the upcoming spy-action sequel Dhurandhar: The Revenge, a high-stakes continuation of the blockbuster franchise directed by Aditya Dhar. The trailer teases an intense revenge-driven story filled with brutal action, political intrigue, and powerful confrontations as the conflict escalates across borders. ⚔️🔥

The film features a powerhouse cast led by Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), alongside Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #TrailerReaction #BollywoodReaction #SpyThriller #IndianCinema

BABY IN YELLOW
Welcome to the Ultimate Minecraft Live Guide! In this comprehensive video, we’ll dive deep into the vibrant world of Minecraft, offering you expert tips and strategies to build, explore, and survive like a pro. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned player, our guide covers everything you need to know to enhance your gameplay experience.

🌍 *Explore New Biomes*: Discover the secrets of each biome, from lush jungles to arid deserts, and learn how to adapt your strategies to thrive in diverse environments.

🏗 *Build Stunning Structures*: Unlock your creativity with our building tips! We’ll show you how to construct impressive houses, intricate designs, and functional farms that will elevate your Minecraft world.

🛡 *Survival Strategies*: Master survival techniques with our expert advice on resource management, combat tactics, and how to fend off mobs. Stay safe and thrive in the challenging world of Minecraft!

🔍 *Pro Tips & Tricks*: Gain insights from experienced players as we share lesser-known tips that can give you an edge over other players.

Whether you’re looking to hone your building skills, explore the vast landscapes, or survive the night, this Ultimate Minecraft Live Guide is your go-to resource. Don't forget to like, subscribe, and hit the notification bell for more Minecraft content! Let’s embark on this adventure together!

Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Ho...
Maarya-maarya phire
Dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi
Ke jeena banjaare ka

Khoya rahun yaad teri

Theek konya haal mera

Re ke haar re ke jeet
Manne chahiye teri preet
Main nibha jaaunga

Dekh bawla bana gi

Teri bairan judaai manne

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya 

Description:
Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Betahasha dil ne
Tujhko hi chaaha hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Tera jaana jaise koi baddua

Gowri Devotional-కి స్వాగతం!

మీ ఆధ్యాత్మిక యాత్రకు ఇది ఒక పవిత్ర వేదిక. ఇక్కడ, మన భక్తి గీతాలు, శ్లోకాలు, స్తోత్రాలు మరియు సాహస్రనామాలతో మీ జీవితాన్ని శాంతితో నింపే లక్ష్యంతో పనిచేస్తున్నాం.

తెలుగు భక్తి సంగీతం மற்றும் భజనాలు: హృదయాన్ని అలరించే ధార్మిక స్వరాల సమాహారం

శ్లోకాలు, స్తోత్రాలు & సాహస్రనామాలు: దేవతలు—లార్డ్ వెంకటేశ్వర, హనుమన్, శివ, గణేశ్, కృష్ణ, లక్ష్మీ దేవి, దుర్గాదేవిపై గానాలు మరియు నివేదనలు

అంతఃశాంతికి పయనం: ప్రతిరోజూ, ప్రతివారూ, లేదా ప్రతినెలా ప్రత్యేక అర్చనాక్రమాలు, ప్రార్థనలు మిమ్మల్ని ఆధ్యాత్మిక ప్రగతికి తేలికగా నడిపిస్తాయి

ప్రారంభించండి, జ్ఞానం పొందండి: మీ ఆత్మానుభూతిని పెంపొందించండి, శాంతి స్ఫూర్తిని పొందండి, ఆధ్యాత్మిక దృష్టిని ఆకర్షించండి

ఈ వేదికకు చేరండి – హమ్ సహజ మనోహర సంగీతంతో మీని ఏర్పరచుకుంటాం. మా ఆధ్యాత్మిక కుటుంబాన్ని పెంచండి, మీ అందమైన మేధసంపదను పంచుకోండి!

సబ్‌స్క్రైబ్ చేయండి, లైక్ చేయండి, షేర్ చేయండి – భక్తి పయనం ప్రారంభిద్దాం!

సబ్‌స్క్రైబ్ చేయండి, లైక్ చేయండి, షేర్ చేయండి – భక్తి పయనం ప్రారంభిద్దాం!

snippet.title: BOMB LAGELU | #Neelkamal_Singh | ( बम लागेलु ) | #नीलकमल सिंह | #Akansha_Puri | LATEST BHOJPURI SONG
snippet.description:
Presenting the energetic Bhojpuri Song “Bomb Lagelu” sung by the hit machine Neelkamal Singh. This song features the stunning Akanksha Puri along with Neelkamal Singh. With powerful music by Vinay Vinayak and catchy lyrics written by Ashutosh Tiwari, this track is full of Bhojpuri swag, romance and desi vibes.

अगर आपको भोजपुरी लोकगीत और धमाकेदार डांस सॉन्ग पसंद हैं, तो यह गाना जरूर पसंद आएगा। वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट करें और अपने दोस्तों के साथ शेयर करना न भूलें।

Song -  Bomb Lagelu ...  ( Lokgeet )
Singer- Neelkamal Singh 
Music - Vinay Vinayak
Lyrics - Ashutosh Tiwari  
Starring - Neelkamal Singh, Akanksha Puri 
Director.- Sumit Kumar
Project Manager T-Series - Sonu Srivastava


SUBSCRIBE T-Series channel Hamaar Bhojpuri for unlimited entertainment
http://www.youtube.com/hamaarbhojpuri
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/
Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/tserieshamaarbhojpuri/

Granny Live! Intense 🔥Escape Room Gameplay || Granny Jumpscares! ||granny legacy #granny #live 


#granny#ive 
#grannygameplay 
#granny1 
#granny2 
#granny3 
#shortsfeed 

Join me for a heart-pounding live playthrough of the infamous horror game, Granny! I'm attempting to escape her house for the very first time, and the tension is REAL.
Watch my complete, unedited attempt to solve the puzzles and find the keys to escape before Granny gets me. This gameplay captures every mistake, every close call, and every loud scream.
If you enjoy horror gameplay and funny reactions, don't forget to like and subscribe!

snippet.title: Zihaal e Miskin (Video) Vishal Mishra, Shreya Ghoshal|Rohit Zinjurke, Nimrit Ahluwalia|Javed-Mohsin
snippet.description:
Presenting the official video of Zihaal e Miskin - the heartbreak song of the season. Featuring Rohit Zinjurke and Nimrit Ahluwalia, this melody has been sung by Vishal Mishra & Shreya Ghoshal, music by Javed-Mohsin And lyrics by Kunaal Vermaa.

#ZihaaleMiskin #RohitZinjurke #NimritKaurAhluwalia  

Create reels on Zihaal e Miskin : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/605950694837426/

🎧 Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/51DEaelXeJJ6cFFYbX8Hal

snippet.title: कजरवा | Antra Singh Priyanka का नया सुपरहिट भोजपुरी गाना | Kajarwa | New #Bhojpuri Song
snippet.description:
Subscribe करने के लिए क्लिक करें 👉 - http://goo.gl/ip2lbk

आप सब इस गाने का Reels बनाए - Make Your Reels :- https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/2194203154656686/

►Song - Kajarwa 
►Singer - Antra Singh Priyanka 
►Featuring - Neha Goswami
►Lyrics - Abhinash Aashu
►Music Director - Vikash Yadav
►Video Director - Aashish Park
►Company/ Label - Wave Music 
►Digital Marketing - Lokdhun 
►Whatsapp - 9718776677
►VG - 44939

♪ Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/2bFlntnPdfTog19NRAE42X
♪ Gaana : https://gaana.com/song/kajarwa-7947-7267
♪ Jio Saavn : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/kajarwa-ka-ke-kajal/KQYCBzhUf14
♪ Apple Music : https://music.apple.com/in/album/kajarwa-ke-ka-haal-ba/1713883342?i=1713883350&app=music
♪ Amazon Prime Music : https://music.amazon.in/tracks/B0BQ8X84WC
♪ YouTube Music : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=qioVeciv-H0
♪ Instagram Reels : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/2194203154656686/
♪ Spotify Playlist : https://open.spotify.com/user/31wrrqxq4vi7pg57rnkxcna4tcqu?si=eed3103487f24692

Lyrics
मुखड़ा
ये सईया कजरवा ई कवना काम के रहीं.2
चूडियां के दूरियां भावत नईखे,
बिंदिया के निंदिया आवत नईखे,
रो-रो के हम कहीं...
ये सईया कजरवा ई कवना काम के रहीं..2

अंतरा 01
मेहरी के सपना अपना कहिया करब पूरा 
रऊया बिना सवख सिंगार बा अधूरा - 2 
रही रही के याद आवता,
सूतलो में सतावता,लोरवा जला बही,,
ये सईया कजरवा ई कवना काम के रहीं..2

अंतरा - 2
ओठवा के लाली बाली बिंदिया उदास बा.
पास कब आईब रऊया राऊरे तलाश बा-2
दिलवा के बढ़ल परेसर बा,
ना बुझत पिया परमेश्वर बा बात कहिले आशु सही
ये सईया कजरवा ई कवना काम के रहीं..2

If you want to see the complete reward list, UC cost, and how the prize path progression works, this video covers everything currently available in PUBG Mobile and what BGMI players should expect when the update launches.

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chota (Official Video) Farmani Naaz | New haryanvi Song | Hema| Naaz
snippet.description:
#terabalamchota  #NaganSiLugai #Naazmusic
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई | Official Video Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2024. Nanhe Nanhe Ghungroo Haryanvi Song Starring with farmani naaz hema chaudhary  
This Haryanvi Song Sung by rahul mulheda. Music given manish tyagi. Penned by Ravi Rangi. Copyright & Music label by NAAZ MUSIC

Laxmi Devi Songs | Laxmi Devi Patalu | Mahalakshmi Devotional Songs Telugu
Listen to the powerful Lakshmi Devi songs dedicated to Goddess Mahalakshmi. These devotional songs bring prosperity, wealth, happiness and positive energy to devotees.

• Laxmi Devi Songs

Goddess Lakshmi is worshipped as the goddess of wealth and prosperity. Listening to Lakshmi Devi songs on Fridays is believed to bring divine blessings and abundance.

Om Shreem Maha Lakshmiye Namaha 🙏

snippet.title: Namo Re Song Promo | Nagabandham | Nabha Natesh | Daksha Nagarkar | Junaid K - Abhe | Abhishek Nama
snippet.description:
Watch the Promo of “Namo Re” Song from the movie Nagabandham featuring the stunning Nabha Natesh and Daksha Nagarkar. This captivating glimpse introduces the musical charm and visual grandeur of the upcoming track.

Composed by the talented duo Junaid Kumar – Abhe, the song promises soulful music blended with vibrant cinematic visuals. Directed by Abhishek Nama and produced by Kishore Annapureddy and Nishitha Nagireddy, Nagabandham brings together an exciting creative team.

Full Video Out Now on 15th-March-2026 

🎬 Movie: Nagabandham
🎵 Song: Namo Re
⭐ Featuring: Nabha Natesh, Daksha Nagarkar
🎶 Music: Junaid Kumar – Abhe
🎬 Director: Abhishek Nama
🎥 Producers: Kishore Annapureddy, Nishitha Nagireddy

#nagabandham  #NamoRe #nabhanatesh  #dakshanagarkar  #JunaidKumar #Abhe #ganeshacharya  #abhisheknama  #tollywoodsongs  #songpromo  #telugumusic  #upcomingsongs 
------------------------------------------ 
Connect with T-Series Telugu: 👉 http://bit.ly/SubscribeToTseriesTelugu
------------------------------------------
🎶 Music Slate 🎶
Song: Namo Re
Album/Movie: Nagabandham
Artist Name: Nabha Natesh, Daksha Nagarkar
Music: Junaid Kumar – Abhe   
Singers: Sindhuja Srinivasan, Aishwarya Daruri       
Lyrics: Sri Harsha Emani 
Arranged, Programmed By Junaid Kumar
Additional Programming: Kranthi Sanjay Bobbili
Additional Rhythm Programming: Kalyan Chakravarthy, Pavan Kumar
Backing Vocals: Lasya Muthyala, Adithi Bhavaraju, Manjushri, Lakshmi Meghana
Children Chorus: Tanavi Manjula, Pradhanya, Shreya Sri
Live Rhythms: Anil Robin, Chiranjeevi, Shankar, Nova 
Veena: Bhavani Prasad 
Flute: Pramod Umapathi
Mixed By Kutty Uday (Chennai)
Mastered By Gethin John At Hafod Mastering, Wales, Uk 
Session Arranged: Kranthi Sanjay Bobbili 
Sound Engineers: Rakesh Mickey, Naresh Mamindla
Studios: Jubilee 10 Studio
Artist Co-Ordination: Vincent, Sanapreddy Sai Kumar
Lyrical Video Composition: Walls & Trends

🎬Movie Details🎬 
 Movie: Nagabandham 
Banner: NIK Studios & Abhishek Pictures 
Cast: virat karrna, Nabha natesh, Aishwarya menon, Daksha nagarkar, Mahesh Manjrekar, jagapathi babu, murali sharma & others
Story, Screenplay & Director: Abhishek Nama 
Producers: Kishore Annapureddy, Nishitha Nagireddy 
Director of Photography: Soundar Rajan S 
Music: Junaid Kumar - Abhe

CEO: Vasu Potini 
Editor: RC Pranav

Action: Kanal Kannan, Vlad Rimburg (USA), Real Sathish, Kecha Khamphakdee, Nandu, Run Navarach (Thailand), Jr. Venkat 
Choreography: Brinda, Ganesh Acharya, Shrasti Verma 
Dialogues: Kalyan Chakravarthy 
Additional Dialogues: Abhishek Nama, Shravan Kumar Tadka 
Script Department: Shra1, Rajiv n Krishna

VFX Director: Abhishek Nama

Costume Chief: Srinivasu Singaram 
Character designers: Preetisheel Singh D'Souza, Pattnam Rasheed

snippet.title: Alvida Alvida Mahe Ramzan 😭 Heart Touching Ramzan Kalam 2026 | Most Emotional Qawwali 2026
snippet.description:
Alvida Alvida Mahe Ramzan 😭 Heart Touching Ramzan Kalam 2026 | Most Emotional Qawwali 2026 

😭 Alvida Alvida Mahe Ramzan – rehmaton, barkaton aur maghfirat ka mubarak mahina ab rukhsat ho raha hai. Har momin ka dil udaas hai kyunki Ramzan Sharif ki roohani fiza humse juda ho rahi hai.

Yeh Heart Touching Ramzan Kalam 2026 Ramzan ki judai aur uski barkaton ko yaad dilane wala ek Most Emotional Qawwali 2026 hai. Is kalam ko sun kar dil bhar aayega aur Ramzan ki yaadein taza ho jayengi.

🤲 Allah Ta'ala se dua hai ke hume dobara Mahe Ramzan naseeb farmaye aur hamari ibadaton ko qubool farmaaye. Ameen.

Agar aapko yeh kalam pasand aaye to Like 👍 Share 📲 aur Channel ko Subscribe 🔔 zaroor karein.

snippet.title: Jawani (Official Video) | Sabba | Meavin | New Punjabi Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records presents “Jawani”, a high-energy Punjabi pop song sung by Sabba. Jawani is the kind of pop song that instantly lifts the mood and gets everyone on the dance floor.

With its upbeat music and powerful vocals, Jawani by Sabba is a perfect addition to any Punjabi party song playlist. Whether you're looking for a Punjabi pop song to groove to, a dance song for parties, or the latest Punjabi song to vibe with friends, this new song delivers the perfect mix of music and energy.

Fans of “32 Dand” and “Fly Karke” by Sabba will definitely enjoy this Sabba song too, as it carries the same energetic vibe and catchy Punjabi pop style that makes Sabba’s music perfect for Punjabi song playlists. If you enjoy Punjabi pop songs, Punjabi party songs, and trending Punjabi dance music, Jawani is a must-listen. Turn up the volume and let the electrifying beats bring the ultimate party atmosphere.

Stay tuned for more Punjabi songs, Punjabi pop hits, and the latest music from Speed Records.

हो कैसे आऊ मिलवे बजेंगे कंगना 
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

हा आवे तो आजा झूठी बात क्यों बनावे,,
दो महीना से रानी येठ क्यों दिखावे 

हा बात बनावे बैठी बैठी अंगना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जावे संजना,,

हा करले सवर बाबू मिलने भी आऊंगी,,
प्यार की है प्यास पानी हाथ से पिलाऊंगी,,

प्यार से बडो कोई रोग हतना,,
पायल की खनक से जगेंगे सजना,,

न चहिए प्यार मोकू बारिश की बूंद को,,
छाती से लगाके देजा मौकु सकून सो,,

हा खून सो जलावे गोरी तेरा हंसना,,
गोली नींद की दे अइयो सो जाएंगे सजना,,

Ho kese aau milve bajenge kangna,,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna 

Aave to aaja jhuti baat Kyo banave,,
Do mahina se rani yeth kyo dikhave,,
Ha baat banave bethi bethi angana,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna

Ha karle savar babu milne bhi aaungi ,,
Pyar ki hai pyas pani hath se pilaungi,,,
Pyar se bdo koi rog hath na,
Payal ki khanak se jagenge sajna,,

N chahiye pyar moku barish ki bund ko,,
Chhati se lagake deja moku sakun so,,

khoon  so jalave gori tera hasna,,
Goli need ki de aiyo so jaave sajna,,,
